title: The Energizer Bunny Christmas Special
description: The Energizer Bunny’s Christmas is in real danger of powering down. Can the holidays be saved?
quote: Oh, I don’t know why I’m so run down. I must be low on Christmas spirit.
altHero: by a Christmas tree, the Energizer Bunny looks deflated, talks to a small battery
alt2: closeup of the battery and he is glowing
alt3: the battery opening up a little door on the back of the Bunny’s bum
alt4: closeup of the Bunny’s surprised face
